description: CompositionPink leggings made of 100% cotton with an elasticated waist and a drawstring insideFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironStylish and in-vogue, this pair of leggings from biba has a hint of retro chic, making it a contemporary essential. The luxe, stretchy fabric is designed to fit to your shape, making sure every day is perfect for leggings. Style this with a kurta and clunky heels or with a tunic and belt.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
